---
applyTo: "**/*.ts,**/*.tsx,src/**/*,app/**/*,components/**/*,lib/**/*"
excludeAgent: "code-review"
---

# CASA frontend instructions

## Rules
- Preserve component and data-fetching patterns
- Explicitly handle loading, error, empty, success states
- Do not fake backend data
- Do not hide integration failures
- Maintain operator clarity
- Avoid cosmetic-only changes unless requested
- Keep types and schemas aligned with backend
